creator: dkelly@hiwaay.net
text:
"can't find /usr/local/lib/mh/slocal"

Fix: 

In the installed files /usr/local/bin/{exmh,exmh-bg}, change

set exmh(slocal) /usr/local/lib/mh/slocal

to

set exmh(slocal) /usr/local/libexec/nmh/slocal


I don't understand the scripts and such used for the exmh2 port
to provide explicit patches. The above only applies to nmh.
How-To-Repeat: 
install the exmh2 port and let it default to install nmh too.
